title: Advanced File Explorer
subtitle: Manage Files Like a Pro!
overview: Students will learn advanced File Explorer features including customizing folder views, using search filters to quickly find files, and compressing/decompressing files for efficient storage and sharing.

images._note: Add screenshots and photos from the actual session.

gallery.caption: Using Search Filters to Find Files
Extracting Files from a ZIP Folder

keyTopics: Introduction to Advanced File Explorer Features
Changing Folder Views (Icons, List, Details, Tiles)
Sorting Files by Name, Date, Type, and Size

youtubeVideos.title: Windows File Explorer Tutorial
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn the basics and advanced features of File Explorer.

youtubeVideos.title: How to Search Files Quickly
youtubeVideos.desc: Using search filters effectively in Windows.

youtubeVideos.title: Compress and Extract ZIP Files
youtubeVideos.desc: Step-by-step guide to creating and extracting ZIP files.

activity.title: File Organization and Compression Challenge
steps: Create subfolders for Images, Documents, and Videos
Move files into the correct folders
Search for a file using the search box
Use type: filter to find only image files
Compress the folder into a ZIP file
Extract the ZIP file to a new location

quiz.q: Which shortcut opens File Explorer in Windows?
quiz.explanation: Windows + E is the shortcut key to open File Explorer.

quiz.q: Which view shows the most file information?
quiz.explanation: Details view displays name, date, type, and size information.

quiz.q: Which search filter is used to find image files?
quiz.explanation: The type: filter is used to search files based on file type.

quiz.q: What is the purpose of compressing files?
options: Reduce file size and combine files
quiz.explanation: Compression reduces storage space and groups files together.

quiz.q: Which file extension is commonly used for compressed folders?
quiz.explanation: ZIP is the most common compressed file format.

quiz.q: What does extracting a ZIP file mean?
options: Opening files from the compressed folder
quiz.explanation: Extraction restores files from the compressed folder.

quiz.q: Which option helps arrange files alphabetically?
quiz.explanation: Sorting by Name arranges files alphabetically.

quiz.q: Which search filter helps find large files?
quiz.explanation: The size: filter is used to search files by file size.

quiz.q: What is File Explorer mainly used for?
quiz.explanation: File Explorer is used to organize and manage files and folders.

quiz.q: Which action creates a compressed folder in Windows?
options: Right Click → Send To → Compressed (zipped) Folder
quiz.explanation: This option creates a ZIP file containing selected files.
